---
name: Feature request
about: Request a new feature for the application
title: "[Feature]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''
type: Feature

---
**User Story**

A User Story summarizing the feature. It should follow the "As a < user > I want to < feature > to < purpose >"

**Feature Description**

A clear and concise description of what the feature should be/do.

**Mockups**

Please attach any available mockups for new views or for updated ones.

**Acceptance Criteria**

List all the acceptance criteria for this Feature to be considered complete and functional.

**Developer Notes**

Add any notes the developer who takes this task should know before working on the feature.

**QA Acceptance Criteria**

List all the acceptance criteria the QA team should have into consideration when testing and reviewing this feature.
